objective: Make tracking ingestion Kafka consumer batch-ready

implementationWorkers.scope: TrackingEventIdempotencyService, V13 raw-write phase migration, and optional idempotency regression test.
TrackingEventFinalizationService and focused finalization service test.
Allowed state, checkpoint, active memory, and thread-registry reconciliation.

rollbackNotes: Preserve unrelated user changes; revert only this checkpoint scope if explicitly approved.
nextAction: Safe-stopped locally. Resume only after Docker/PostgreSQL and live ClickHouse runtime evidence is available; prove idempotency, ambiguous/partial batch behavior, physical raw-event duplicate behavior, and downstream reconciliation before marking DONE.
outcome: Local tracking ingestion batch-consumer hardening is implemented and validated: tracking now uses a dedicated long-horizon batch Kafka error handler, raw-write/finalization ledger phases, duplicate batch filtering, Docker-independent migration checks, and ClickHouse local/runtime schema repair for writer lineage columns. It is not DONE because Docker/Testcontainers Postgres proof and live ClickHouse raw_events dedupe/reconciliation evidence are unavailable.
validationRun: PASS: .\mvnw.cmd -pl services/tracking-service -am "-Dtest=TrackingEventConsumerTest,TrackingEventIdempotencyMigrationTest,TrackingEventIdempotencyServiceTest,TrackingEventFinalizationServiceTest,TrackingKafkaConsumerConfigTest,TrackingKafkaConsumerConfigContextTest,TrackingEventPublisherTest,ClickHouseWriterTest,ClickHouseRollupServiceTest,ClickHouseInitSqlTest,TrackingIngestionServiceTest" "-Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false" test (48 tests, 7 Docker-gated skips)
PASS: .\mvnw.cmd -pl shared/legent-kafka,services/tracking-service -am test (shared/common/security/cache/kafka plus tracking; tracking 70 tests, 7 Docker-gated skips)
PASS: git diff --check -- services/tracking-service shared/legent-kafka infrastructure/docker/local .codex (CRLF warnings only)
residualRisks: Docker/Testcontainers was unavailable, so TrackingEventIdempotencyServiceTest PostgreSQL/Flyway behavior is skipped until Docker or target Postgres evidence is available.
ClickHouse raw_events still lacks live dedupe/reconciliation proof for ambiguous or partial JdbcTemplate.batchUpdate failures; duplicate raw analytics and overcount risk remains.
This is local validation only, not production throughput, BI-grade ClickHouse, or release readiness evidence.
